summary: Iteration 29: Tested 11 bug fixes and features for consultant CMS. Backend API tests: 16/16 passed. Frontend UI tests verified key features.

integration_issues.issue: /#services did not scroll on initial page load (scroll position was 0), but /#about worked correctly (scrolled to 795px). May be timing issue with services section rendering.

action_items: Investigate /#services hash URL scrolling - may need longer delay in ScrollToTop component for sections that load data asynchronously
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 features appear to be implemented correctly based on code review and testing
ScrollToTop component handles hash URLs with 150ms delay (App.js lines 247-261)
RichTextEditor has indent/outdent buttons and predefined color palette with #000000 (RichTextEditor.js lines 10-11)
HeroSection uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML for title/subtitle preserving inline styles (HeroSection.js lines 78, 83, 126, 131)
Hero media dimensions (media_width, media_height) are applied to photo/video (HeroSection.js lines 101-108)
Services have external_url and open_in_new_tab fields with ServiceLink component (HomePage.js lines 96-105)
Short description renders as HTML with dangerouslySetInnerHTML (HomePage.js lines 121, 147, 170)
LegendsTestimonialsBlock has auto-slide (5s), arrow navigation, dot indicators (BlockRenderer.js lines 116-169)
CSS has H1 styles for .rich-text-content, nested list styles, and word-break fix (index.css lines 67-94, 280-287)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features from iteration 29 have been tested. Backend APIs all pass. Frontend features verified via code review and UI testing. Minor issue: /#services hash URL may not scroll on initial load due to timing - /#about works correctly. The Legends & Testimonials carousel block is fully functional with auto-slide, navigation arrows, and dot indicators.

features_verified.scroll_to_top: PASS - ScrollToTop component implemented with hash handling
features_verified.hyphen_word_break_fix: PASS - CSS word-break: normal and hyphens: manual
features_verified.short_description_html: PASS - dangerouslySetInnerHTML used for service cards
features_verified.anchor_scroll_hash_urls: PARTIAL - /#about works, /#services may have timing issue
features_verified.hero_media_dimensions: PASS - media_width and media_height fields in admin and applied in HeroSection
features_verified.service_external_url: PASS - external_url and open_in_new_tab fields in admin and ServiceLink component
features_verified.rich_text_nested_lists: PASS - indent/outdent buttons in RichTextEditor toolbar
features_verified.legends_testimonials_block: PASS - Carousel with auto-slide, arrows, dots, API integration
